response.justification: Solid 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience with production systems at scale (Sociomantic's millions of req/s), full-stack delivery, and demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, OSS projects, and founding work. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal role. Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/IC6, and there's limited evidence of cross-team systemic platform work or data science partnership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Deep polyglot experience (TS/JS, Python-adjacent, C/C++, Java, D) with 13+ years across web, backend, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Proven low-latency production work at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second with caching and async I/O
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops, OSS contributions, and AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout/guardrail systems
Lacks explicit telemetry/metrics infrastructure work and statistical/experimental analysis background required for growth engineering
Current and prior titles top out at Staff/Senior; no evidence of IC6/Principal-level cross-org influence or multi-workstream platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed systems and polyglot engineering depth
No evidence of Principal/IC6-scope cross-team leadership
